onboarding.title: Welcome to ScanUpGo! 👋
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your business identity together.

hero.subheading: Stop letting customers leave without a trace. Capture them, skyrocket your Google reviews, and build lasting loyalty through gamification.
hero.cta_subtext: 14-day free trial, no credit card required

howItWorks.section_subtitle: Stop letting customers leave without a trace. Convert every visitor into a growth lever for your business.
howItWorks.step1_title: 90% of traffic is lost. 1 scan to recover it.
howItWorks.step1_subtitle: Engage your visitors at the exact moment when their attention is at its peak.
howItWorks.step2_subtitle: Visibility isn't bought, it's earned (or engineered). By linking the game to a review, you multiply your star count. Climb to the top of search results and attract new customers automatically.
howItWorks.step2_review_text: Great experience! Very welcoming staff and impeccable service. Highly recommend!
howItWorks.step3_subtitle: A customer who wins is a customer who returns. Offer an instant reward (coffee, discount) via the fortune wheel. By associating a positive emotion with your brand, you create lasting loyalty far more powerful than any punch card.

benefits.section_subtitle: More than just a game -- a powerful suite of tools to transform your visibility and build customer loyalty.
benefits.fidelity_description: Turn every casual visitor into a regular. All on autopilot.
benefits.notifications_description: Stop letting your customers be strangers. Automatically collect their data (Email, Name) with every scan.
benefits.seo_description: Improve your Google Maps ranking automatically.
benefits.reviews_description: Average results observed in the first 3 months of use.
benefits.visibility_description: Reach all your customers in just a few clicks.

examples.title: Flyers that convert
examples.subtitle: Our clients generate hundreds of Google reviews every month thanks to attractive, branded materials.
examples.feature1_subtitle: Track the performance of each material in real time.
examples.feature2_subtitle: Full respect for your branding (logo, colors, fonts).

testimonials.section_subtitle: Discover how ScanUpGo turns satisfied customers into engaged ambassadors.
testimonials.review1_text: ScanUpGo revolutionized our customer relationships! In 3 months, we generated 150 Google reviews.
testimonials.review2_text: Our customers have become our best ambassadors. The system is simple and effective.
testimonials.review3_text: Our sales increased by 40%. Customers come back more often and recommend us.
testimonials.review4_text: Perfect solution for retaining our members. The interface is intuitive and results are immediate.
testimonials.review5_text: Our customers love the concept! It's modern, fun, and effective. Our visibility has skyrocketed.
testimonials.review6_text: ScanUpGo helped us modernize our customer approach. Google reviews are pouring in.

faq.section_subtitle: Find quick answers to your questions about ScanUpGo
faq.a1: ScanUpGo lets your customers play a fortune wheel by scanning a QR code. To participate, they must leave a Google review or complete a social action. You collect reviews, they win rewards.
faq.q2: How long does it take to set up ScanUpGo?
faq.a2: Setup is very fast. Once your account is created and your flyers are approved, everything is operational within 24 hours. Our team supports you every step of the way.
faq.q3: What types of rewards can I offer?
faq.a3: You have full control: free coffee, discount, free dessert... You define the prizes, their win probabilities, and the conditions.
faq.q4: Does ScanUpGo work on all smartphones?
faq.a4: Yes, our solution is a web app instantly accessible via any mobile browser (iOS and Android), with no installation required.
faq.q5: Can I customize the game's appearance?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Your flyers are custom-designed to match your brand, and the game interface can be adapted with your logo and colors.
faq.a6: You have access to a real-time dashboard that shows you the number of scans, reviews generated, prizes distributed, and rating trends.
faq.a7: Our monthly plans have no commitment and can be cancelled anytime. The annual plan commits you for 12 months with a significant discount.
faq.a8: Yes! All our clients benefit from dedicated support via email and phone. The Growth plan includes personalized monthly follow-ups.

contact.subtitle: Our team of experts is here to help you implement your gamification marketing strategy. Fill out the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.form_message_placeholder: Describe your project, your specific needs...

features.hero_subtitle: A powerful suite of tools disguised as a fun game. Discover how ScanUpGo transforms your visitors into ambassadors.
features.gamification_subtitle: No more awkward review requests. With our digital fortune wheel, leaving a review becomes an exciting game for your customers.
features.gamification_feature1_subtitle: You decide how many customers win.
features.gamification_feature2_subtitle: One game per customer (IP and cookie control).
features.gamification_feature3_subtitle: The customer is sent directly to your Google listing.
features.dashboard_subtitle: Stay in control. Track your performance in real time and manage your business from a clean, simple interface.
features.customization_subtitle: Customize the experience to perfectly match your visual identity.
features.customization_card1_subtitle: Upload your logo and choose your colors for a seamless integration.
features.customization_card2_subtitle: Define your own rewards: coffee, dessert, discount, or merchandise.
features.customization_card3_subtitle: Edit welcome and congratulation messages to speak directly to your customers.

pricing.hero_highlight: pays for itself from the 1st review

footer.cta_title: Ready to boost your customer reviews?

featuresGrid.dashboard_subtitle: Stop flying blind. Track your reviews, analyze your performance, and celebrate your wins at a glance.
featuresGrid.review1_text: Great concept, I won a coffee! The team is awesome. ☕
featuresGrid.review2_text: Love the idea, it's different from typical restaurants.
featuresGrid.customization_subtitle: Logo, colors, rewards... The game adapts to you, not the other way around. 100% Customizable.
featuresGrid.installation_subtitle: Zero technical skills needed. Sign up, print, and you're live.

about.seo_description: Meet the team behind ScanUpGo and our mission: helping local businesses turn their customers into ambassadors through gamification.
about.mission_subtitle: We believe every local business deserves to shine. Our mission is to give you the simple, powerful tools to dominate your local market.
about.story_p1: It all started with a simple observation: the best business owners are often the least visible. They spend their time taking care of their customers, not managing their SEO.
about.story_p3: We created ScanUpGo to automate review collection in a fun way. No more awkward requests at the counter. Make way for games, rewards, and recognition.
about.value1_description: Your success is our success. We build tools to help you grow.
about.value2_description: We constantly push boundaries to make review collection fun and effective.
about.value3_description: No hidden fees, no fake reviews. Just authentic, organic growth.
about.founder_quote: Local SEO expert and passionate entrepreneur. I lead the product vision and strategy to help business owners take back control.

socialProof.title: They trust us for their reviews

cta.title: Don't let your potential go to waste.
cta.subtitle: Your future customers are looking for the best business. Show them it's you. Start now, no commitment.
